_comment: Models on the user's Higgsfield 'Unlimited Access History' plan.
Update this file when your subscription changes — see 'Unlimited Access History (Beta)' on https://higgsfield.ai.
The Higgsfield UI shows display names; this file maps them to CLI job_set_type IDs.
default_video is the model used when --hf-model is not passed.

video.fits_sprite_use_case: yes — strong character consistency, supports 'static shot' prompts
ok — known for some character drift between frames; cheap fallback
video.note: Mapping uncertain — UI shows 'Pro Fast'; CLI exposes 'Seedance 1.5 Pro' as seedance1_5

video.fits_sprite_use_case: yes — Kling family has best character lock; may not match exactly
video.note: Mapping uncertain — UI shows '2.5 Turbo'; CLI has kling2_6 (Kling 2.6 Video) as closest
